nodes.name: visuals
nodes.prompt:
[segment 0] A single vertical 9:16 clip that moves through 12 shots played one after another over time (a fast-edited sequence with hard, snappy cuts on a tight timeline (each shot brief and driving)).
Within each shot keep motion dynamic and lively: energetic subject movement and expressive camera moves.
Keep the SAME product identical in every shot — the product is: BIODANCE Collagen Peptides Jelly Serum Mist, a Face Mists, Jelly Serum Mist, Sprayable Hydrogel, in a Spray bottle. Its shape, packaging and colors must stay exactly the same across all shots.
Keep the same person consistent across every shot; exactly one person, no duplicate people.
The person is NOT talking: mouth relaxed and mostly closed, no lip movement, no speaking, no lip-sync. AUDIO: ambient and diegetic sounds only (room tone, product handling, fabric, water); absolutely NO voice, NO speech, NO dialogue, NO narration, NO singing, and no spoken words in any language. Voiceover is added separately.
Do not render any on-screen text, captions, subtitles, letters, words or watermarks; clean footage with no text overlay.
character: strikingly beautiful young woman with a warm deep brown skin tone and radiant glass-skin glow, elegant oval face, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, dark tight curly natural hair gathered into a high puff bun with soft curls framing the hairline, full naturally pink-brown lips, flawless top viral beauty-influencer presence, slim fit build, wearing a soft pastel pink sleeveless ribbed top and small silver hoop earrings; product (keep identical in every shot): BIODANCE Collagen Peptides Jelly Serum Mist, a Face Mists, Jelly Serum Mist, Sprayable Hydrogel, in a Spray bottle; mood and tone: radiant, fresh, vibrant, approachable; framing: vertical 9:16, subject very large — tight on the face, from the upper chest up so the face fills most of the frame (face beauty product); color grading matching this palette: pastel pink, warm deep brown, soft white, dewy silver; location: A bright, modern, minimalist bathroom or aesthetic vanity space with clean white and soft pastel accents; lighting: Soft, diffused natural morning sunlight blended with a gentle front-facing beauty light to emphasize a radiant, dewy glass-skin finish; mood: Fresh, vibrant, and uplifting, with a clean, luxurious, and approachable beauty-influencer aesthetic; no on-screen text, captions, letters or watermarks
Shot 1: Extreme Close-up — the BIODANCE Collagen Peptides Jelly Serum Mist product in focus, Extreme close-up of her flawless deep brown skin catching the light. She wears a pastel pink ribbed top, her dark tight curls in a high puff bun, holding the pink BIODANCE bottle near her glowing cheek with a vibrant, approachable smile.. Camera: Fast push-in.
Shot 2: Macro detail — the BIODANCE Collagen Peptides Jelly Serum Mist product in focus, She vigorously shakes the pink bottle, highlighting the unique, thick hydrogel jelly texture bouncing inside before it sprays.. Camera: Handheld orbit.
Shot 3: Close-up — the BIODANCE Collagen Peptides Jelly Serum Mist product in focus, Her finger decisively presses the pump down, releasing a wide, luxurious cloud of fine mist toward the lens.. Camera: Quick zoom to product.
Shot 4: Medium shot — the creator, Wearing her pastel pink ribbed top, she sprays the mist in a halo around her face, eyes softly closed with a joyful, vibrant smile.. Camera: Whip pan into frame.
Shot 5: Extreme Close-up — the creator, Tiny dewy mist droplets settle onto her deep brown cheek, visibly melting into a glossy, hydrated finish.. Camera: Slow push-in.
Shot 6: Close-up — the creator, She gently but quickly pats her cheeks with both hands, demonstrating the bouncy, plump elasticity of her skin.. Camera: Fast tilt up.
Shot 7: Medium shot — the creator, She turns her elegant oval face side-to-side, her small silver hoop earrings catching light alongside her intense glass-skin glow.. Camera: Arc shot.
Shot 8: Close-up — the BIODANCE Collagen Peptides Jelly Serum Mist product in focus, She thrusts the pink BIODANCE bottle directly toward the camera lens, showcasing the clean beauty label.. Camera: Quick push-in.
Shot 9: Over-the-shoulder — the creator, She touches up her tight curly high puff bun in the mirror, her radiant reflection dominating the bright, modern minimalist bathroom.. Camera: Handheld tracking.
Shot 10: Close-up — the creator, She turns back to the camera, mouth open in a joyful, authentic 'wow' reaction, excitedly tapping her glowing cheek.. Camera: Fast zoom in.
Shot 11: Hands detail — the BIODANCE Collagen Peptides Jelly Serum Mist product in focus, Her hands firmly pop the cap back onto the pink bottle, shifting focus sharply onto the sleek product design.. Camera: Static with fast focus pull.
Shot 12: Medium Wide — the BIODANCE Collagen Peptides Jelly Serum Mist product in focus, She holds the bottle out toward the viewer, then playfully points down to the screen bottom with a confident, glossy smile.. Camera: Whip pan.
